overview.subtitle: At a glance
overview.title: CJM: Transforming spaces with exceptional fabrics
overview.paragraph1: CJM leads the global vision behind BASSARI, FLAMENCO, HARBOUR, ARENA and CJM, five decorative textile brands defined by design, quality, and innovation. Founded on November 23, 2000 by the Caracuel Jiménez Marqués family, the company specializes in creating, producing, and marketing high-performance fabrics for both indoor and outdoor furniture, serving residential and contract markets worldwide.
overview.paragraph2: At CJM GROUP, creativity and manufacturing expertise come together to shape inspiring textile solutions. Our two business divisions continue to expand internationally, with a presence in over 30 countries across four continents.
overview.paragraph3: Sustainability at CJM goes beyond responsibility—it’s a commitment to generating long-term value for our customers, our people and the planet . Our strategy is built on minimizing environmental impact at every stage, from design to production, ensuring our fabrics contribute to a more sustainable future.

madeInSpain.title: Designed in Spain
madeInSpain.subtitle: From Andalusia to the world
madeInSpain.paragraph1: CJM WORLDWIDE LTD. designs and develops all of its fabrics and wallpapers in Spain. Our production philosophy is rooted in close collaboration with our suppliers, integrating them as part of our company to achieve products of exceptional quality.
madeInSpain.paragraph2: We are an international company and, in developing our five brands, we capture and express the essence and influences of diverse cultures in every new collection. We celebrate diversity and our curiosity to explore new horizons is endless —this is how we forge our own path.
madeInSpain.paragraph3: We take great pride in the design and innovation behind our brands: BASSARI, FLAMENCO, HARBOUR, ARENA and CJM.

headquarters.title: Headquarters
headquarters.paragraph1: Our headquarters are located in Montilla, Córdoba (Spain), where we design, store and wholesale our fabrics and wallpapers. We operate with best-in-class platforms that ensure a seamless and efficient manufacturing and distribution process.
headquarters.paragraph2: Our production process is driven by advanced supply chain management strategies. CJM GROUP coordinates closely with its network of suppliers and outsources its logistics operations, while keeping the creative development of its designs in-house.
headquarters.paragraph3: Leveraging external services allows us to deliver just-in-time solutions and provide an immediate response to our customers. Our sales platform operates as a direct extension of our company, ensuring efficiency, agility and excellence in every interaction.

nuestrasMarcas.title: Brands
nuestrasMarcas.subtitle: Five brands. The same quality standard
nuestrasMarcas.paragraph1: Design, innovation and durability. These are our brands—the seal that represents us in homes and contract projects around the world.

timeline.step2Desc: Production in Spain with coordinated suppliers.

contactCTA.title: Do you have a project in mind?
contactCTA.description: Our experts will guide you in selecting the perfect fabrics to enhance every space. Share your vision, and we’ll provide tailored advice—no commitment required.
